component.name: Lingot PyQt6
component.summary: Experimental PyQt6 frontend for the Lingot tuner

description.p: Lingot PyQt6 is an experimental frontend for LINGOT, a musical instrument tuner. It reuses Lingot's existing C engine for audio capture, pitch detection, FFT analysis, configuration files, UI settings, and Scala scale support.
This frontend is being ported incrementally from the stable GTK application. The GTK frontend remains available as Lingot while the PyQt6 port reaches feature parity.

ul.li: Spectrum display backed by the existing Lingot engine.
Configuration dialog with input, algorithm, frequency, and scale settings.
